title: Cape Cod
author: Henry David Thoreau
content: “A man may stand there and put all America behind him.”

title: The Iron Heel
author: Jack London
content: “I know that the world is mine to conquer.”
action: Define the scope of your territory.

title: Roughing It
author: Mark Twain
content: “The secret of success is making your vocation your vacation.”

title: Walking
author: Henry David Thoreau
content: “I wish to speak a word for Nature, for absolute freedom and wildness.”

title: Burning Daylight
author: Jack London
content: “He was not a man who could sit still.”
